title: psychotria vasquezii
intro: Psychotria vasquezii, also known as the 'Sapo' plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to provide health benefits such as wound healing, skin protection, and anti-arthritic properties. Preparations of Psychotria vasquezii can be found in herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and topical applications.
